---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a problem with the content pipeline skill
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the bug

A clear description of what went wrong.

## Which agent or stage failed?

- [ ] Research Agent
- [ ] Analytics Agent
- [ ] Writer Agent
- [ ] Editor Agent
- [ ] SEO/GEO Agent
- [ ] Master Agent
- [ ] Quality gate (specify which)
- [ ] Pipeline orchestration
- [ ] Other

## Steps to reproduce

1. Ran `/content-pipeline "..."`
2. Pipeline reached stage ...
3. Error occurred: ...

## Expected behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages.

## Pipeline files (if relevant)

Paste the contents of any relevant `.claude/pipeline/` files, or describe what they contain.

## Environment

- Claude Code version: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- Model used: [e.g., Sonnet, Opus]
- OS: [e.g., macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Data sources connected: [e.g., GSC + DataForSEO, none]

## Additional context

Any other information that might help diagnose the issue.
